channel.title: Connection Pool on Mengboy Tech Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Connection Pool on Mengboy Tech Notes

item.title: Go + OpenAI API Timeout Troubleshooting: DNS, TLS, Proxy, and Connection Pool
item.description:
When OpenAI API calls start timing out in production, the real problem is usually not “OpenAI is down.”

The real problem is you don’t know which hop is failing: DNS, TLS handshake, proxy path, or your own connection pool.
